beg.desc: Kotlin runs on the JVM. Declare constants using val and variables using var.

int.desc: Understand Kotlin type inference and explicit type signatures.
int.code:
val pi: Double = 3.14159
var score: Float = 95.0f
val active = true

pro.desc: Use string templates to interpolate variables inside text.

beg.desc: Handle nullability safely using nullable types and safe calls (?.).
beg.usecase: Preventing null pointer errors at compile time.

int.desc: Use the Elvis operator (?:) to provide fallback default values.

pro.desc: Force unwrap values using the !! operator when sure they are not null.

beg.desc: Use when expressions as modern switch replacements that return values.

int.desc: Combine multiple values or execute ranges checks inside when blocks.

pro.desc: Use when without arguments to replace nested if-else condition checking chains.
